qtype: Money problem with fixed and variable cost
tex:
Angelique rents a room for a party.
\newline
The cost of renting the room is \$15.50 for the first hour and then \$7.25 for each additional hour.
\newline
She pays \$95.25 in total.
\newline
Work out the total number of hours she rents the room for.
\newline

stem.content:
Angelique rents a room for a party.
\newline
The cost of renting the room is \$15.50 for the first hour and then \$7.25 for each additional hour.
\newline
She pays \$95.25 in total.
\newline
Work out the total number of hours she rents the room for.
\newline

_rawBody:
Angelique rents a room for a party.
The cost of renting the room is \$15.50 for the first hour and then \$7.25 for each additional hour.
She pays \$95.25 in total.
Work out the total number of hours she rents the room for.

\AnswerLine[][hours]
\Marks{3}

tex:
Yasmin has 4 white flowers, 3 red flowers and x yellow flowers.
\newline
She picks a flower at random.
\newline
The probability that it is white is $\dfrac{1}{5}$.
\newline
Find the probability that it is yellow.
\newline

\newline
